name: bukhari
title: Sahih al-Bukhari
author: Imam Muhammad ibn Ismail al-Bukhari
description: The most authentic collection of Hadith after the Quran.

books.name: Revelation
books.description: Hadiths detailing the initial encounters of Prophet Muhammad (ﷺ) with the Angel Jibril and the beginning of divine revelation.

books.name: Belief
books.description: Fundamental teachings on faith (Iman), its branches, and matters of belief in Allah, His Angels, Books, Messengers, and the Last Day.

books.name: Knowledge
books.description: The virtues of seeking Islamic knowledge, the etiquette of a student, and the responsibility of scholars to convey the truth.

books.name: Ablutions (Wudu')
books.description: Rulings and methods of physical purification (Wudu), illustrating the spiritual and physical cleanliness required for prayer.

books.name: Bathing (Ghusl)
books.description: Guidelines concerning the major ritual bath (Ghusl) and the circumstances requiring it.

books.name: Menstrual Periods
books.description: Islamic jurisprudence regarding menstruation (Hayd) and postnatal bleeding, detailing their effect on worship.

books.name: Rubbing hands and feet with dust (Tayammum)
books.description: The rules for dry ablution using clean earth or dust when water is unavailable or using it is harmful.

books.name: Prayers (Salat)
books.description: Detailed instructions on the times, methods, and spiritual dimensions of the five daily prayers (Salat).

books.name: Times of the Prayers
books.description: Detailed instructions on the times, methods, and spiritual dimensions of the five daily prayers (Salat).

books.description: Detailed instructions on the times, methods, and spiritual dimensions of the five daily prayers (Salat).

books.name: Invoking Allah for Rain (Istisqaa)
books.description: The prayer for seeking rain (Salat al-Istisqa) performed during times of drought.

books.description: Sunnah of the eclipse prayers (Salat al-Kusuf and Khusuf), recognizing natural phenomena as signs of Allah's power.

books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.description: Detailed instructions on the times, methods, and spiritual dimensions of the five daily prayers (Salat).
